raw_data.details: The “Mukhyamantri Balika (Snatak) Protsahan Yojana”, is a component of the “Mukhyamantri Kanya Utthan Yojna”, launched by the Department of Education, Bihar. The scheme aims to promote higher education and empower girls by making them self-reliant. A lump sum incentive of ₹25,000 is awarded to girl students from Bihar who have successfully graduated from recognized institutions within the state. The amount is directly transferred to the beneficiary's bank account.
raw_data.benefits: Financial Incentive: ₹25,000 as a one-time allowance.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Bihar. The applicant must have graduated or obtained an equivalent degree (including Alim or Shastri) after April 25, 2018, from a government-recognized or affiliated institution within Bihar. The scheme applies to graduates from general, technical, or professional courses. The applicant must have an account in any nationalized bank, recognized private bank or India Postal Payment Bank located in Bihar.
raw_data.application_process:
OnlineRegistration Process:
Step 1: Visit the [Registration page](https://medhasoft.bih.nic.in/SnatakStudent/(S(g3mz4xgoeranmfbzt31lazfp))/Register.aspx).
Step 2: Enter all the mandatory details and create a new password. Validate the Captcha code.
Step 3: Click on “Submit” to generate the login ID and Password. Application Process:
Step 1: Visit the [Login page](https://medhasoft.bih.nic.in/SnatakStudent/(S(segtokfpkf2xy1vikgkqwhqx))/Login.aspx? Id=19).
Step 2: Enter all the mandatory details and upload all the required documents.
Step 3: Recheck all entries before final submission, no modifications can be made in the application after final submission.
Step 4: Click on “Submit” and take a printout of a copy of the submitted application. Check application Details: [Click Here.](https://medhasoft.bih.nic.in/SnatakStudent/(S(ibr5z42hxfxjsvsvthsdu5rm))/ApplicationStatusofStudent.aspx)Payment Done Information: [Click Here.](https://medhasoft.bih.nic.in/SnatakStudent/(S(ibr5z42hxfxjsvsvthsdu5rm))/RPT/PaymentDoneInfo.aspx)Helpdesk: For technical problems: [Click Here](https://medhasoft.bih.nic.in/SnatakStudent/(S(hrbnlrdjhi3044o1rrfpc4n4))/HelpDesk.aspx). Note: If the name of the concerned college is not in the list, the applicant should contact the Registrar of their University and request to add its name.
raw_data.documents_required: Photo of Student [Photo size should be less than 50 KB. (Prescribed size: 200 x 230 px)]. Signature of Student [Signature size should be less than 20 KB. (Prescribed size: 140 x 60 px)]. Aadhaar Card of Student [Upload only Black & White Scan PDF file of the document and the size of the file should be 500 kb or less]. Permanent Residential Certificate of Bihar [Upload only Black & White Scan PDF file of the document and the size of the file should be 500 kb or less]. First Page of Bank Pass Book [Upload only Black & White Scanned PDF file of the document and the size of the file should be 500 kb or less]. Graduation Certificate/Passing Marksheet [ Upload only Black & White Scan PDF file of the document and file size should be 500 kb or less].

Frequently Asked QuestionsWhat is "Mukhyamantri Balika (Snatak) Protsahan Yojana"? The scheme aims to encourage higher education among girls in Bihar by providing a one-time incentive of ₹25,000 to eligible graduate students of the state.

Who is eligible for the scheme? Any girl who is a permanent resident of Bihar and has completed her graduation or an equivalent degree from a recognized institution after April 25, 2018, is eligible for the scheme.

What benefit is provided under the scheme? Under the scheme, a one-time financial incentive of ₹25,000 is provided to eligible girl graduates.

Which courses are included under this scheme? The scheme includes general, technical, professional, and equivalent courses.

Are graduates from Open Universities eligible for the scheme? Yes, graduates from affiliated and recognized Open Universities located within Bihar are eligible for this scheme.

How is the incentive amount disbursed to beneficiaries? The incentive amount is directly transferred to the beneficiary's registered bank account.

Is there an income limit to apply for this scheme? No, there is no income limit for applying to this scheme.

What is the application process for the scheme? Applicants can apply online through the dedicated portal created for the scheme.

Is there a deadline for submitting the application? Applicants should check the official portal for the specific deadlines for application submission.

Can diploma holders apply for this scheme? No, only graduates or those with equivalent degrees are eligible for this scheme.

Can a student avail of this scheme more than once? No, the scheme provides a one-time financial incentive, and students cannot apply for it more than once.

Are students from other states who studied in Bihar eligible for this scheme? No, only residents of Bihar are eligible for this scheme.

Whom should applicants contact for queries or assistance regarding the scheme? Applicants can contact the designated helpline number or visit the official website for any queries or assistance related to the scheme.

Sources And References[Guidelines](https://medhasoft.bih.nic.in/SnatakStudent/(S(dym3bdrzp51hjvjkft4hpem5))/pdf/Advt.pdf)OkWas this helpful?
